name: Poppy Dungeons - Poppy Playtime
description: Damn! Purple monsters have appeared in the city, threatening the personal safety of humans. As a warrior, come join Poppy Dungeons to defeat the monsters and restore peace to the city! You need to collect pistols to gain fighting abilities! Help the survivors to get out of the dungeon successfully! Although it's very difficult, victory always belongs to the righteous side! Have fun!
tags: Action, Adventure, Boy, Boys, Escape, Fun, Kid, Kids, run, running
